leads.issues: The homepage's own title tag reads 'Pet groomer | W•A•G Studio | Ohio' with no mention of Washington Township or Dayton, the actual area the studio serves and competes in for local search - despite the business's real address being 9158 Dayton Lebanon Pike, Washington Township, OH. Separately, the large hero photo at the top of the homepage - the one linked directly to the studio's contact email - has alt text that just reads 'Untitled,' an unedited default rather than a real description.
leads.opportunity: Rewriting the title tag to lead with 'Washington Township' and 'Dayton, OH,' and replacing the 'Untitled' alt text with a real description, are both same-day fixes. Expected within 30 days: better matching for 'dog groomer Washington Township' and 'dog groomer Dayton' searches, plus improved accessibility and Google Image Search eligibility for the hero photo.
leads.email_body:
Hi,

I was looking at dog groomers around Washington Township and noticed something on W.A.G Studio's homepage - your title tag (the text Google shows in search results) just reads 'Pet groomer | W•A•G Studio | Ohio,' with no mention of Washington Township or Dayton anywhere, even though that's exactly where you are and who you're competing against locally. I also noticed your hero photo - the one linked to your contact email - has alt text that just says 'Untitled.'

I put together a page showing both fixes and what they'd mean for your site:
https://organic-theory.vercel.app/leads/funnels/2026-07-15-wag-studio.html

You can also see how I work at https://organic-theory.vercel.app

No pressure at all, just thought it was worth flagging since a Best of Dayton runner-up finish and seven groomers on staff deserve a homepage that actually says where you are.

Gabriel Balenton | Organic Theory Founder

leads.issues: Every page's footer still reads 'Copyright 2015 Alert Locksmiths Limited. Site Designed by Mobile Marketing New Zealand. All Rights Reserved' - visible to every visitor, eleven years out of date. Separately, the homepage has no meta description tag at all - confirmed by inspecting the page's head metadata, where the field is simply absent - so Google auto-generates a search snippet instead of showing something the business actually chose to say.
leads.opportunity: Updating the stale copyright year and writing a real meta description are both same-day fixes. Expected within 30 days: a homepage that reads as actively maintained rather than frozen in 2015, and a proper search snippet for 'locksmith Ellerslie' and 'locksmith Auckland' searches instead of an auto-generated one.
leads.email_body:
Hi,

I was looking at locksmiths in Ellerslie and noticed something on Alert Locksmiths' site - every page's footer still reads 'Copyright 2015 Alert Locksmiths Limited,' which is eleven years out of date and the kind of detail a cautious customer notices before trusting you with a key to their home. I also checked and there's no meta description tag anywhere in the homepage's metadata, so Google is auto-generating your search snippet instead of showing something you'd actually choose to say.

I put together a page showing both fixes and what they'd mean for your site:
https://organic-theory.vercel.app/leads/funnels/2026-07-15-alert-locksmiths.html

More at https://organic-theory.vercel.app

No pressure at all, just thought it was worth flagging since 50 real years as a family-owned, MLAA-registered locksmith deserve a site that looks looked-after.

Gabriel Balenton | Organic Theory Founder
